zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Thomas於1392年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾拉格藍時，他的父親Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert36歲，母親Maud de Morley23歲。他於1421年與Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1446年在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍享年54歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ap Thomas于1392年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾拉格藍时，他的父亲Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert36岁，母亲Maud de Morley23岁。他于1421年与Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1446年在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍享年54岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Breton, German, Dutch, Flemish, Danish, Greek, West Indian (mainly Haiti and Jamaica), and African (mainly Tanzania and Nigeria): from the personal name Thomas, of Biblical (New Testament) origin, from Aramaic t’ōm’a, a byname meaning ‘twin’. It was borne by one of the disciples of Christ, known for his scepticism about Christ's resurrection (John 20:24–29). The Th- spelling is organic, the initial letter of the name in the Greek New Testament being a theta. The English pronunciation as t rather than th- is the result of French influence from an early date. In Britain, the surname is widely distributed throughout the country, but especially common in Wales and Cornwall. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages (e.g. Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Toma and Tuma , Albanian Toma and Thoma , and Slavic surnames listed in 3 below), and their patronymics and other derivatives (e.g. Polish Tomaszewski and Slovenian Tomažič; see Tomazic ). In France, this surname is most common in the Vosges and Brittany. The name Thomas is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Machan , Mammen , and Oommen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Thomas (see 1 above) as a surname.

Germanized or Americanized form of Polish Tomas , Tomasz, and Tomaś, Sorbian Tomaš (see also 4 below), Croatian Tomaš and Tomas , Slovenian Tomaš and Tomaž, Czech and Slovak Tomáš, all meaning ‘Thomas’.

variants.name: Maas
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: from a short form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Mashak
meanings: Americanized form of Polish Maszak: patronymic from a short form of the personal name Tomasz (see Thomas ) or possibly of a personal name beginning with Ma-. The surname Maszak is very rare in Poland.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ). Compare Mashek .

variants.name: Maschke
meanings: German: from a Slavic-influenced (see below) pet form of the personal names   Thomas   (compare   Maas  ) or   Matthias  .
Germanized form of Sorbian Mašk, Maška, and Maško: from a pet form of the personal name Domaš or Tomaš (see Thomas 3, 4), or of any name beginning with Ma-.
Germanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ) and Polish Maszek, both cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Toma
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Kamal, Nabil, Salem, Kamil, Safa, Samir, Adil, Adnan, Aziz, Bahjat, Basem, Bashar.  Japanese Hiroshi, Takeo, Hideo, Isako, Izumi, Junichi, Kenji, Kiyoko, Masakazu, Rikuo, Sachi, Shigeo.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Toma, an equivalent of Thomas . Compare Tomas .

Italian, French, Polish, Slovak, and Hungarian: from a short, pet, or dialect form of a personal name equivalent to Thomas (Italian Tommaso, French Thomas, Polish Tomasz, Slovak Tomáš, Hungarian Tamás).

variants.name: Mask
meanings: English: unexplained.
German: from a pet form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ciro, Larraine.
Italian: from a short form of Tommasino, a pet form of thepersonal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Mascio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Gino, Luigi, Paolo, Salvatore.
Italian:
(southern): from a variant of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ). Alternatively, perhaps from an Italianized form of the Albanian equivalent Mashi.

variants.name: Masel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt.
German: from a pet form of   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Mario, Vito, Carlo, Antonio, Alfonso, Armando, Filomena, Gerardo, Giovanni, Salvatore, Alfonse, Alfonsina, Amato, Anello, Canio, Emilio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Masiello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Rocco, Angelo, Carmine, Franco, Salvatore, Antonio, Carmino, Domenic, Domenica, Francesco, Mauro.
Italian (mainly Naples): from a pet form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Thomas was born in 1392, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert, was 36 and his mother, Maud de Morley, was 23. He married Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch in 1421, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1446, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 54, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ap Thomas est né en 1392, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maud de Morley, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch en 1421, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1446, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Thomas 1392 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert 36 und seine Mutter Maud de Morley 23. Er hat 1421 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1446 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Thomas è nato il nel 1392 nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Morley, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch nel 1421, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1446, nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Thomasが1392年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbertは36歳，母Maud de Morleyは23歳であった。1421年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでBleddyn Ap Maenyrchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1446年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで54歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Thomas(이)가 1392년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Morley(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1446년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Thomas nasceu em 1392, em Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Morley, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch em 1421, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1446, em Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Thomas родился в 1392 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Morley, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch в 1421 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1446 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Thomas nació en 1392, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas ap Guillem Herbert, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maud de Morley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Bleddyn Ap Maenyrch en 1421, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1446, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
